wolfbreaker.name: Wolfbreaker
wolfbreaker.flavor_text: The hunters pass your name along the road whenever alpha sign turns fresh again.

gorgos_slayer.name: Gorgos-Slayer
gorgos_slayer.description: You broke the toll-lord of Ironridge.
gorgos_slayer.flavor_text: Stonewatch and Ironridge both remember the day the held line stopped bending to Gorgos.

ashwall.name: Ashwall
ashwall.description: You steadied Emberfall when the ward line threatened to break.
ashwall.flavor_text: Among shrine folk, your name carries the sound of a wall held when ash and duty met head-on.

iron_sentinel.name: Iron Sentinel
iron_sentinel.description: The Hunter Guild marks you as Silver-rank field talent.
iron_sentinel.flavor_text: Guild clerks and road captains alike speak of you as someone trusted to hold a dangerous line.

vault_delver.name: Vault Delver
vault_delver.description: You entered the Ashen Vault and came back with the tale intact.
vault_delver.flavor_text: Vaultreach scholars use your name as proof that the old dark can still be entered without surrendering the road behind you.
